title: astragalus xiphidium
intro: Astragalus xiphidium, also known as Huangqi, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus xiphidium has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, thereby providing various health benefits. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, capsules, or tablets, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
